content.hint: 承认局限后，需用研究发现与更广泛背景的关联来支撑普遍性

blanks.answer: the patterns observed align with broader trends in similar educational contexts
options: the results are too good to be generalizable
I just picked who was available
the patterns observed align with broader trends in similar educational contexts
everyone thinks the same way anyway

content.situation: 教授在学术答辩中质疑研究结论的普遍性，要求研究者解释其发现为何适用于更广泛群体。
content.speakerText: Your findings are based on a narrow group of participants. How can you claim these results apply more broadly?
content.speakerTextCn: 你的发现基于一个狭窄的参与者群体，你如何声称这些结果具有更广泛的适用性？
content.knowledgePoint: 承认局限 + 数据/模式支撑普遍性
content.responseTemplate: I recognize the scope is limited, but ___

content.hint: 解释方法选择时，需紧扣研究目标，而非主观偏好或操作困难

blanks.answer: the study aimed to uncover the underlying reasons behind those attitudes
options: I didn't know how to design a questionnaire
the study aimed to uncover the underlying reasons behind those attitudes
questionnaires are too expensive to use
students refused to fill out surveys

content.situation: 评审专家询问为何未采用量化方法，而选择定性分析来探究学习者态度变化。
content.speakerText: Why didn't you use a standardized questionnaire to measure attitudes more objectively?
content.speakerTextCn: 你为何不使用标准化问卷来更客观地测量态度变化？
content.knowledgePoint: 用研究目标解释方法选择
content.responseTemplate: A questionnaire would have measured surface-level responses, but ___

content.hint: 面对因果质疑时，需提供证据说明排除了干扰变量或突出了核心变量的作用

blanks.answer: the control group showed no similar change, suggesting the intervention was the primary driver
options: those factors don't matter in education
the control group showed no similar change, suggesting the intervention was the primary driver
I just assumed they were constant
everyone had the same teacher anyway

content.situation: 导师质疑研究中提出的因果关系，要求说明如何排除其他可能影响因素。
content.speakerText: You link the intervention directly to improved outcomes, but what about other variables like prior experience or instructor style?
content.speakerTextCn: 你将干预直接与结果改善联系起来，但其他变量如先前经验或教师风格呢？
content.knowledgePoint: 回应因果质疑：通过对照或控制变量强化因果推��
content.responseTemplate: While those factors could play a role, ___

content.hint: 表达方法与研究目标的契合，常用搭配是 'suited the goal'

options: suited
fit
matched
aligned

content.template: Qualitative methods better ___ the exploratory nature of this research.
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：suit + noun（方法与目标匹配）

content.scenarioHint: 教授在听取学生研究陈述后，要求学生解释其研究方法选择的理由，学生需用研究目标来合理化方法选择
content.speakerText: You used ethnographic observation instead of quantitative surveys. Why?
content.speakerTextCn: 你使用了民族志观察而非定量调查，为什么？
content.responseTemplate: ___ better suited the exploratory nature of my research.

options: Ethnographic observation
Quantitative surveys
Online questionnaires
Statistical analysis

content.hint: 回忆如何用研究目标解释方法选择，避免使用主观理由如‘我觉得’
content.knowledgePoint: 用研究目标解释方法选择

content.scenarioHint: 教授质疑研究结论的普遍性，学生需回应如何在承认局限的同时合理支持推广性
content.speakerText: Your findings are based on a small, non-random sample. How can you claim broader applicability?
content.speakerTextCn: 你的发现基于一个小的、非随机样本，你如何声称具有更广泛的适用性？
content.responseTemplate: The sample reflects ___ contexts, making the trends potentially generalizable.

options: representative
random
ideal
typical

content.hint: 回忆如何在承认局限的同时，用‘代表性’来合理支持推广性，避免使用‘很大’或‘足够’等模糊词
content.knowledgePoint: 承认局限+数据支撑，避免回避或夸大
